title: Chapter III: Lantern Docks

region.name: Lantern Docks
region.summary: A harbor district where night visibility, wet pavement, and shadow reading dominate.
region.theme: night driving, glare, and wet-surface caution

submap.name: Fog Quay
submap.summary: A dockside street threaded with puddles, bus stops, bike lanes, and reflective lights.

source: Expanded in Spark 2 from chatgpt_conv.md and the Road Master roadmap.
authoringNotes: Make the harbor feel reflective, shadowed, and slightly unstable.
Treat glare and wetness as first-class hazards, not cosmetic details.
Keep the recovery notes short so fatigue mistakes can be corrected quickly.
